notes:
Cache namespace hardening + image API release surface + Qwen affine-JANG text-only routing.

Production-eligible (live-proven):
- ZAYA1-8B + ZAYA1-VL-8B all profiles (MXFP4, JANGTQ4, JANGTQ_K) — user picks Auto/On/Off thinking per quality preference
- Qwen3.6-35B MoE: text + image + video (MXFP4 + MXTQ/JANGTQ)
- Ling JANGTQ: hybrid SSM (28 GLA + 4 MLA), /v1/responses multi-turn cache reuse (non-reasoning model)
- Hy3 JANGTQ2: 80 TurboQuantKVCache layers, Low/High reasoning effort picker (no Medium), Hunyuan tools + qwen3 reasoning parser
- MiniMax JANGTQ: 43+ visible tok/s with SIMD-shuffle Hadamard kernel

Cache namespace hardening (vmlx 7404e072):
- Disk cache records (paged blocks, SSM companion, TQ disk cache, prefix cache, block disk store) now properly scoped by runtime fingerprint — stale records from prior process lifecycle no longer silently restored on wake / auto-update
- 108-line cache_bypass regression guard ensures the gap doesn't reopen
- Hybrid SSM companion + ZAYA CCA + DSV4 composite + Hy3 TurboQuantKV all benefit

Image API release surface (vmlx 7770d00f):
- API quick-start panel now shows real curl / Python / JavaScript examples for /v1/images/generations and /v1/images/edits when an image session is selected
- Mask data URL prefix correctly stripped before POST to /v1/images/edits
- Image edit snippets treat mask.png as optional except for Fill/inpaint flows
- 40-test image edit + mask regression slice

Qwen routing correctness (vmlx 80a62555):
- Affine-JANG Qwen3.5/3.6 hybrid VLM bundles correctly route text-only — works around the mlx_vlm.qwen3_5.language MRoPE text-fallback bug ("reasoning preserved, visible empty" symptom no longer reachable for these bundles)
- Preempted for qwen3_vl + qwen3_vl_moe families
- MXFP4 / MXTQ / JANGTQ Qwen retain full VL/video capability

Carry-over (not regressions, documented):
- DSV4 long-context coherence still not public-upload-clean — root cause is 2-bit routed expert quality floor in current bundles; re-quantization with 4-bit routed experts required to clear production
- i18n key restoration in progress (zh/ko/ja/es locales partial; English fallback covers all surfaces)
